rationale: The citing paper explicitly states that its Christmas ornament task was adapted from prior creativity research, including Dahl and Moreau (2007), giving the cited work a concrete methodological role. This is more than a passing background mention because the cited study informs how a core experiment is operationalized. At the same time, the citing paper does not primarily position itself as correcting or extending specific 2007 claims; it mainly reuses that prior constrained-creation paradigm to test new moderators and mechanisms.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Dahl and Moreau (2007) as an experimental template, adapting its constrained creative task structure in Experiment 2. It uses that setup to examine new predictions about choice-set size, experience, focus, and enjoyment.
